lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Hey there [player name], Do you want that shopping list now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It depends, what do I get out of it again?

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: I've got this Death Talisman I could give you in return. You'll need it if you want to get into the altar.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok sure thing, what do you need?

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: You'd better take this list, we need everything on it! Just bring them to me and I'll take them off your hands.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm no thanks, I'm not interested.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Hi again, how're you doing with those items we need?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got some of them with me.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Great, can I take everything I need?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah sure.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Doesn't look like you do to me.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Thanks, I've updated your list for you.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Great, thank you so much for getting all that for us! Please take this Death Talisman as a reward.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Anytime you want another one of those Talismans come see me and I'll sort you out with another list.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd rather you didn't.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Doesn't look like you do to me.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: I see you've got the [item], can I have it please?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, here you go!

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Thanks, I've updated your list for you.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Great, thank you so much for getting all that for us! Please take this Death Talisman as a reward.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Anytime you want another one of those Talismans come see me and I'll sort you out with another list.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I'll keep hold of it for now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have another copy of the list?

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Try not to lose it this time, we need everything on it! Just bring them to me and I'll take them off your hands.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Looks like you're carrying enough stuff at the moment.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: You already have the list! Just bring them to me and I'll take them off your hands.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you need all this stuff for?

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Oh well, we don't get many deliveries down here, so it's supplies mostly...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What about the [ticket]?

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Well you see.. Umm... We don't really get much chance to.. Er.. Go out or anything... And we'd like some of the prizes some day...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So why didn't you ask for the prizes then?

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Oh no, that'd just be sad.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So why do you want the [book]?

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Oh just some light reading, it's nice to catch up on current events occasionally.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Current events? But it's... Oh nevermind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you explain the [key]?

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Ah... Um... I'm not sure how that got on the list... Can we have it anyway?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right, why do I get the feeling I shouldn't?

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Pretty please with a Blood Talisman on top?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A Blood Talisman?!

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Oops! I meant 'Death Talisman'!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, right, all those are just 'supplies'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you need all this stuff for?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'd better get looking for them.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Hello again, feel like getting us some more supplies?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay sure thing, what do you need?

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: You'd better take this list, we need everything on it! Just bring them to me and I'll take them off your hands.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm no thanks, I'm not interested.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Here you go.
